title: Agify API Vocabulary
description: Domain vocabulary and term definitions for the Agify age prediction API.

terms.definition: The predicted age in years of a person with the given name, derived from statistical analysis of name-to-age distributions across billions of records. Returns null when insufficient data exists for the name.
The number of data records used to compute the age prediction for a given name. Higher counts indicate greater statistical confidence in the predicted age.
A person's first name submitted for age prediction. The API applies preprocessing including diacritic normalization and first/last name parsing when the exact name is not in the dataset.

An ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 two-letter country code used to scope age predictions to a specific country. Providing a country code improves prediction accuracy, with testing showing 94.35% accuracy versus global fallback methods.
An API authentication key obtained from the Agify dashboard. The same key is shared across Agify.io, Genderize.io, and Nationalize.io. The free tier provides 2,500 name lookups per month.
A single HTTP request that submits up to 10 names simultaneously using array query parameter syntax (name[]=anna&name[]=john). Each name in a batch counts individually toward the monthly allowance.
HTTP response header indicating the total number of name lookups allowed within the current billing period under the current plan.
HTTP response header indicating how many name lookups remain in the current billing period.
HTTP response header containing a Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) indicating when the monthly allowance will reset.
Preprocessing step applied when a name with accent marks or diacritics is not found in the dataset. The API strips diacritics (e.g., converting é to e) and retries the lookup before returning null.
The Agify dataset contains over 908 million data rows spanning 195+ countries following ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 standards. Data is sourced from publicly available datasets across the web.
The Danish company that operates the Agify.io, Genderize.io, and Nationalize.io name prediction APIs.
